mapper.select: SELECT af.* FROM avatar_frame af JOIN user_avatar_frame uaf ON af.id = uaf.frame_id WHERE uaf.user_id = #{userId} AND uaf.is_using = 1

SELECT * FROM avatar_frame WHERE
#{level} >= required_level OR
#{vipType} >= required_vip_type OR
(#{loginDays} >= required_days AND required_days IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY required_level DESC, -- 等级高的优先 required_vip_type DESC, -- VIP等级高的优先 required_days DESC -- 天数要求高的优先
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO avatar_frame(name, url, preview_url, required_level, ...) VALUES(#{name}, #{url}, #{previewUrl}, #{requiredLevel}, ...)
mapper.update: UPDATE avatar_frame SET name = #{name}, url = #{url}, preview_url = #{previewUrl}, ... WHERE id = #{id}
